hero.title: XR Extended Reality
hero.subtitle: A seamless blend of the real and the virtual
hero.description: Unifying AR, VR, and MR to deliver immersive experiences and lead the next computing wave.

overview.title: What is XR?
overview.p1: XR (Extended Reality) is an umbrella term covering AR, VR, and MR. It blurs the boundary between the physical and digital worlds to enable new forms of interaction.
overview.p2: Our XR solutions combine computer vision, spatial computing, and sensing to deliver end-to-end services—from concept to deployment—for education, healthcare, retail, manufacturing, and more.

ar.title: AR — Augmented Reality
ar.intro: Overlays digital content on the real world for navigation, education, and marketing.

vr.title: VR — Virtual Reality
vr.intro: Fully immersive virtual environments for training, entertainment, and virtual meetings.

mr.title: MR — Mixed Reality
mr.intro: Combines strengths of AR and VR so digital objects interact with the real world; ideal for industrial design and healthcare.

items.title: 3D Content Creation
items.desc: Professional modeling, texturing, and animation for realistic scenes and assets.

items.title: Tracking & Localization
items.desc: Accurate 6DoF via SLAM with seamless indoor/outdoor mapping.

items.title: Multimodal Interaction
items.desc: Gesture, voice, and eye-tracking for natural interactions.

items.title: Multi-user Collaboration
items.desc: Real-time sync for teamwork in shared virtual spaces.

items.title: Performance Optimization
items.desc: Rendering optimizations for various hardware to ensure 60fps+.

items.title: System Integration
items.desc: Seamless integration with existing enterprise systems and workflows.

cards.title: Manufacturing
cards.desc: Assembly training, remote maintenance, design review, digital twin visualization

cards.title: Education & Training
cards.desc: Immersive lessons, virtual labs, historical reconstructions, skill practice

cards.title: Healthcare
cards.desc: Surgical planning & simulation, rehabilitation, medical education, telemedicine support

cards.title: Retail & E-commerce
cards.desc: Virtual try-on, 3D product display, virtual stores, AR shopping assistants

cards.title: Real Estate & AEC
cards.desc: Virtual tours, architectural visualization, interior previews, progress tracking

cards.title: Entertainment & Tourism
cards.desc: VR games, virtual tourism, heritage digitization, immersive exhibitions

items.title: Cross-platform Support
items.desc: Meta Quest, HoloLens, Magic Leap, Apple Vision Pro, plus iOS/Android mobile AR.

items.title: Advanced Rendering
items.desc: PBR materials, real-time ray tracing, dynamic shadows for photorealism.

items.title: AI-powered Enhancements
items.desc: Computer vision and ML for intelligent recognition, scene understanding, and content generation.

items.title: Cloud XR
items.desc: Cloud rendering and edge compute lower device requirements and broaden access to high-quality XR.

cta.title: Ready to start your XR journey?
